We need to determine the falling distance using d = k*t^2. Let me find k from the examples.
I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

t = 1.22s, d = 11.48m:
t^2 = 1.22 * 1.22:
1.22 * 0.02 = 0.0244
1.22 * 0.20 = 0.2440
1.22 * 1.00 = 1.2200
0.0244 + 0.2440 = 0.2684
0.2684 + 1.2200 = 1.4884
k = 11.48 / 1.22^2 = 11.48 / 1.4884 = 11.480 / 1.488
= 0 + 1 * 11480 / 1488
= 1 + 1 * 9992 / 1488
= 2 + 1 * 8504 / 1488
= 3 + 1 * 7016 / 1488
= 4 + 1 * 5528 / 1488
= 5 + 1 * 4040 / 1488
= 6 + 1 * 2552 / 1488
= 7 + 1 * 1064 / 1488
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 10640 / 1488
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 9152 / 1488
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 7664 / 1488
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 6176 / 1488
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 4688 / 1488
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 3200 / 1488
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 1712 / 1488
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 224 / 1488
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 2240 / 1488
= 7.71 + 0.01 * 752 / 1488
= 7.710 + 0.001 * 7520 / 1488
= 7.711 + 0.001 * 6032 / 1488
= 7.712 + 0.001 * 4544 / 1488
= 7.713 + 0.001 * 3056 / 1488
= 7.714 + 0.001 * 1568 / 1488
= 7.715 + 0.001 * 80 / 1488
= 7.715

t = 1.13s, d = 9.85m:
t^2 = 1.13 * 1.13:
1.13 * 0.03 = 0.0339
1.13 * 0.10 = 0.1130
1.13 * 1.00 = 1.1300
0.0339 + 0.1130 = 0.1469
0.1469 + 1.1300 = 1.2769
k = 9.85 / 1.13^2 = 9.85 / 1.2769 = 9.850 / 1.276
= 0 + 1 * 9850 / 1276
= 1 + 1 * 8574 / 1276
= 2 + 1 * 7298 / 1276
= 3 + 1 * 6022 / 1276
= 4 + 1 * 4746 / 1276
= 5 + 1 * 3470 / 1276
= 6 + 1 * 2194 / 1276
= 7 + 1 * 918 / 1276
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 9180 / 1276
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 7904 / 1276
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 6628 / 1276
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 5352 / 1276
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 4076 / 1276
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 2800 / 1276
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 1524 / 1276
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 248 / 1276
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 2480 / 1276
= 7.71 + 0.01 * 1204 / 1276
= 7.710 + 0.001 * 12040 / 1276
= 7.711 + 0.001 * 10764 / 1276
= 7.712 + 0.001 * 9488 / 1276
= 7.713 + 0.001 * 8212 / 1276
= 7.714 + 0.001 * 6936 / 1276
= 7.715 + 0.001 * 5660 / 1276
= 7.716 + 0.001 * 4384 / 1276
= 7.717 + 0.001 * 3108 / 1276
= 7.718 + 0.001 * 1832 / 1276
= 7.719 + 0.001 * 556 / 1276
= 7.719

t = 2.61s, d = 52.52m:
t^2 = 2.61 * 2.61:
2.61 * 0.01 = 0.0261
2.61 * 0.60 = 1.5660
2.61 * 2.00 = 5.2200
0.0261 + 1.5660 = 1.5921
1.5921 + 5.2200 = 6.8121
k = 52.52 / 2.61^2 = 52.52 / 6.8121 = 52.520 / 6.812
= 0 + 1 * 52520 / 6812
= 1 + 1 * 45708 / 6812
= 2 + 1 * 38896 / 6812
= 3 + 1 * 32084 / 6812
= 4 + 1 * 25272 / 6812
= 5 + 1 * 18460 / 6812
= 6 + 1 * 11648 / 6812
= 7 + 1 * 4836 / 6812
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 48360 / 6812
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 41548 / 6812
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 34736 / 6812
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 27924 / 6812
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 21112 / 6812
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 14300 / 6812
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 7488 / 6812
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 676 / 6812
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 6760 / 6812
= 7.700 + 0.001 * 67600 / 6812
= 7.701 + 0.001 * 60788 / 6812
= 7.702 + 0.001 * 53976 / 6812
= 7.703 + 0.001 * 47164 / 6812
= 7.704 + 0.001 * 40352 / 6812
= 7.705 + 0.001 * 33540 / 6812
= 7.706 + 0.001 * 26728 / 6812
= 7.707 + 0.001 * 19916 / 6812
= 7.708 + 0.001 * 13104 / 6812
= 7.709 + 0.001 * 6292 / 6812
= 7.709

t = 3.59s, d = 99.37m:
t^2 = 3.59 * 3.59:
3.59 * 0.09 = 0.3231
3.59 * 0.50 = 1.7950
3.59 * 3.00 = 10.7700
0.3231 + 1.7950 = 2.1181
2.1181 + 10.7700 = 12.8881
k = 99.37 / 3.59^2 = 99.37 / 12.8881 = 99.370 / 12.888
= 0 + 1 * 99370 / 12888
= 1 + 1 * 86482 / 12888
= 2 + 1 * 73594 / 12888
= 3 + 1 * 60706 / 12888
= 4 + 1 * 47818 / 12888
= 5 + 1 * 34930 / 12888
= 6 + 1 * 22042 / 12888
= 7 + 1 * 9154 / 12888
= 7.0 + 0.1 * 91540 / 12888
= 7.1 + 0.1 * 78652 / 12888
= 7.2 + 0.1 * 65764 / 12888
= 7.3 + 0.1 * 52876 / 12888
= 7.4 + 0.1 * 39988 / 12888
= 7.5 + 0.1 * 27100 / 12888
= 7.6 + 0.1 * 14212 / 12888
= 7.7 + 0.1 * 1324 / 12888
= 7.70 + 0.01 * 13240 / 12888
= 7.71 + 0.01 * 352 / 12888
= 7.710 + 0.001 * 3520 / 12888
= 7.710

k values: 7.715, 7.719, 7.709, 7.710
k values (sorted): 7.709, 7.710, 7.715, 7.719
The median k is 7.710.

For t = 1.92:
t^2 = 1.92 * 1.92:
1.92 * 0.02 = 0.0384
1.92 * 0.90 = 1.7280
1.92 * 1.00 = 1.9200
0.0384 + 1.7280 = 1.7664
1.7664 + 1.9200 = 3.6864
= 3.6864

d = 7.71 * 3.6864:
7.71 * 0.0004 = 0.003084
7.71 * 0.0060 = 0.046260
7.71 * 0.0800 = 0.616800
7.71 * 0.6000 = 4.626000
7.71 * 3.0000 = 23.130000
0.003084 + 0.046260 = 0.049344
0.049344 + 0.616800 = 0.666144
0.666144 + 4.626000 = 5.292144
5.292144 + 23.130000 = 28.422144
= 28.422

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{28.422}
